description: Default configuration for Context Slim context window optimization. All token counts use cl100k_base tokenizer equivalents.

budget_allocations.description: Default token budget allocations by category as percentage of total context window.

system_prompt.description: System instructions, role definitions, and behavioral constraints. Never compressed.

user_instructions.description: CLAUDE.md, project-specific instructions, and user preferences.

active_context.description: Current conversation turns, recent tool outputs, and working memory.

file_contents.description: File contents read during the session. Compressed using structural summaries.

tool_results.description: Results from tool invocations (bash, grep, glob, etc.).

historical_context.description: Earlier conversation turns and completed task context.

structural_summary.description: Replace file contents with structural summaries (function signatures, class outlines, key constants).

conversation_pruning.description: Remove older conversation turns, keeping only summaries and key decisions.

tool_result_truncation.description: Truncate large tool outputs (grep results, file listings) to most relevant entries.

deduplication.description: Remove duplicate file reads and repeated information across context.

semantic_compression.description: Use AI to semantically compress text while retaining meaning. Most aggressive strategy.

waste_detection_patterns.name: duplicate_file_reads
waste_detection_patterns.description: Same file read multiple times without modification

waste_detection_patterns.name: large_unfiltered_grep
waste_detection_patterns.description: Grep results exceeding 200 lines without filtering

waste_detection_patterns.name: full_file_when_partial_needed
waste_detection_patterns.description: Reading entire file when only a few lines are needed

waste_detection_patterns.name: verbose_bash_output
waste_detection_patterns.description: Bash commands producing excessive output without head/tail limiting

waste_detection_patterns.name: stale_context_retention
waste_detection_patterns.description: Context from completed tasks still consuming tokens

waste_detection_patterns.name: redundant_search_patterns
waste_detection_patterns.description: Multiple similar searches that could be combined
